ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., laptop, tablet, monitor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the product */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Available stock quantity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute (e.g., screen size, RAM, storage) */,
  "attribute_type" TEXT /* Type of attribute (e.g., integer, string, boolean) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the attribute */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the attribute */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the attribute is required for the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the attribute was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the attribute was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attribute_values" (
  "attribute_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute value */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attribute the value belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the value belongs to */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute (e.g., 15, 8GB, 512GB) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the attribute value */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the attribute value is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the attribute value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the attribute value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attribute_values_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_id") REFERENCES attributes ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attribute_values_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_attribute_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "attribute_value_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attribute value that was changed */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the change occurred */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the attribute */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the attribute */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "is_reverted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the change was reverted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the change event was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_attribute_history_attribute_value_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_value_id") REFERENCES attribute_values ("attribute_value_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, product manager, sales) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being accessed */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attribute being accessed */,
  "accessed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the data was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser) used for access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access event was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_id") REFERENCES attributes ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attribute_types" (
  "attribute_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute type */,
  "attribute_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute type (e.g., integer, string, boolean) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the attribute type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the attribute type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the attribute type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_types" (
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product type */,
  "product_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the product type (e.g., laptop, tablet, monitor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_type_id")
)
